title: Fermented Comforting Norwegian Runner Beans Grill
description: A traditional Norwegian side dish featuring fermented runner beans, grilled to a crispy perfection, perfect for a comforting meal with family and friends.

ingredients.name: runner beans
ingredients.amount: 1 cup, trimmed and cut into 1-inch pieces

ingredients.name: fermented bean paste (such as aquafaba or miso paste)
caraway seeds
ingredients.notes: optional, but traditional in Norwegian cuisine

instructions: Preheat a yakimono-grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together fermented bean paste, olive oil, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Add the runner beans to the bowl and toss to coat with the fermented bean paste mixture.
Thread the runner beans onto skewers, leaving a small space between each bean to allow for even cooking.
Brush the grill grates with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the runner beans for 5-7 minutes per side, or until they are tender and slightly charred.
Transfer the grilled runner beans to a serving platter.
Sprinkle with caraway seeds and grain-free breadcrumbs, if using.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
Repeat the process with any remaining runner beans.
